name: Layout Grid
summary: A masonry-style grid where cards expand to fill half the layout when clicked using Framer Motion layout animations.
detailedDescription: Layout Grid creates an interactive gallery where cards animate between grid and expanded states using Framer Motion's layoutId shared element transitions. The component accepts an array of cards with id, content, className, and thumbnail properties. Clicking a card triggers a three-state system: null (no selection), lastSelected (previous selection), and selected (current selection). The selected card uses layoutId='card-{id}' to animate from its grid position to a centered overlay position (h-1/2, w-full/md:w-1/2, z-50) with rounded-lg styling. Image elements use separate layoutId='image-{id}-image' for smooth image transitions. When expanded, cards display their content with a dark overlay (60% opacity black) and animated content that slides up from y:100 with fade-in. A backdrop div with pointer-events-auto when selected provides click-outside-to-close functionality, animating opacity from 0 to 0.3. The grid uses responsive col-spans (1 col mobile, 3 cols desktop) with gap-4 spacing. This creates a polished lightbox-like gallery experience ideal for portfolios, image showcases, or any grid where items need elegant expansion animations.
purpose: Display image grids with expand-on-click interaction
Animate cards between grid and expanded states
behavior: Tracks selected and lastSelected card states
Animates selected card to centered overlay position
Uses layoutId for shared element transitions
Displays content overlay with dark background
Slides content up from bottom on expand
Closes on backdrop click with opacity animation
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
